content.en:
There are many middle-level realm gods here, and there are even high-level realm gods.

Although the high-level realm god will be suppressed a lot of strength here, it will still be more powerful than the middle-level realm god!

If there is no high-level realm god sitting here, this place will definitely be attacked by high-level demon seeds.

"There are really a lot of middle-level realm gods of the top forces, and a dozen or so top forces can casually send so many middle-level realm gods into the realm of the Dongwu Realm!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

If a powerful force is allowed to send a middle-level realm god, every powerful force can't send many middle-level realm gods, and if it is barely a powerful force, how dare a few middle-level realm gods be sent over!

I have to say that the gap between the powerful forces and the top forces in the Eastern Wu Realm is too great, as if they are worlds apart.

However, it is also normal, because it is difficult for powerful forces to get more resources in the Eastern Wu Realm, but the top forces are different, they can obtain a large number of resources in the Eastern Wu Realm Seam Realm, and these resources are enough for them to cultivate a large number of middle realm gods and even high-level realm gods.

Because of this, the strength of the top forces far exceeds that of the powerful ones.

But this time, the losses of the mid-level realm gods of the top forces are too great, and they are in a weak position, if they continue like this, their foundation will be destroyed.

That's why they let these mid-level realm gods with a strong 570 power come to help.

There are more than a hundred powerful forces in total, and some of them also have a lot of middle-level realm gods, and these middle-level realm gods can also send out many middle-level realm gods, which can reverse some of the situation.

......

After Ye Tian and these middle-level realm gods came here, they learned about the situation here.

After they learned some information from the middle-level realm gods of those top forces, they dared to leave this ancient city.

"It seems that the situation of those top forces is really not very good!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He observed that almost all of the middle-level realm gods who stayed here were injured, and the injuries were not light, in fact, they were not guarding here, but staying here to heal.

It is estimated that there are still many middle-level realm gods and even high-level realm gods who are still looking for resources in this realm of the Dongwu Realm and killing the demon seeds.

Ye Tian didn't stay here, he left directly from here, and also went to look for resources.

Soon after.

"Let's condense the other replica bodies here!"

Ye Tian looked around, this place is relatively remote, and it is very good here.

Soon, Ye Tian (AFEH) condensed a replica body, which allowed this replica body to continue to search for resources.

He condensed the copy body, and also prevented the copy body from being killed, resulting in his own no copy body.

Then, he can only let the replica body of the outside world in again.

So, it's better to just copy a copy body here.

Of course, he didn't think that he would be killed here, after all, his current strength was very strong, and he was a middle-level realm god, so his strength would not be suppressed, and the strength of those high-level demon seeds would be suppressed.

Therefore, he has an absolute advantage.

......

"This is worthy of being the realm of the seams that the top forces crave, and there are really a lot of resources!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

Because just now, he found a good thing.

【Blood Fruit】

A total of six Blood Ebony Fruits were produced on this Blood Crow Tree.

This thing is a good thing that can refine the Eternal Dao Seed, but it is only of great help to the middle-level realm gods, and is of little use to the high-level realm gods.

His Eternal Dao Seed itself is very powerful, so for him, the effect of the Blood Fruit is limited, but if it is for the human race, it is enough for those Beginner Realm Gods to quickly refine the Eternal Dao Seed, or for the Intermediate Realm Gods to quickly improve the Eternal Dao Seed!

"The top forces and demon seeds have been scraping here for countless years, why do they find good things so easily?"

Ye Tian was very puzzled.

He picked the six blood black fruits on the spot and stayed here for a while longer.

A realm god at the peak of the middle rank of the Eternal Realm God Realm came here, saw Ye Tian, and saw the blood black fruit tree where the blood black fruit had been picked, didn't say anything, and turned to leave.

Seeing this scene, Ye Tian frowned slightly.

The other party seems to know that there is a blood black fruit here, so he specially came to get it.

He stared at the blood black fruit tree again, stared carefully, and silently deduced it again, and suddenly made an astonishing discovery.

"This Blood Ebony Fruit Tree is about to bloom again, and the efficiency of breeding Blood Ebony Fruit is definitely countless times that of the outside world!In other words, if you breed resources here, it is estimated that it is countless times easier than the outside world!"

This moment.

Ye Tian finally understood why the resources of the Boundary Rift Realm were so fast, as if they could never be mined.

Under normal circumstances, the resources of those boundary cracks or other treasures are limited, and once they are mined almost equally, it will take a long time to continue to breed.

However, the boundary rift is different, but the resources here are very rich, and even if they are mined, they can be bred again after a period of time.

Because of this, the resources here seem to be inexhaustible.

"The top forces didn't say anything about it at all, and they didn't want to say it!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Maybe when the situation stabilizes, the top forces may also ban the powerful ones from staying here, and it would be better if no powerful forces discover the secrets here.

Of course, the other gods of the world are not stupid, and maybe they will find out soon.

"A treasure land with inexhaustible resources, no wonder the top forces and demon seeds are crazy to compete for this place, these realm cracks are the real battlefield, before the demon seed abyss invaded the realm of the god realm and the eternal realm realm, it is estimated that they are all petty fights!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Now that I think about it, it was indeed a small fight, those demon seeds invaded the Eternal Realm, and only sent so many demon seeds, not even a high-level demon seed, not even a few mid-level realm gods.

This is probably the temporary decision of a small demon force in the abyss of the demon seed to invade the Eternal Realm.

In fact, the Demon Seed Abyss really doesn't care much about the Eternal Realm.

Even if they occupied the Eternal Boundary, it would be meaningless to them, and they didn't dare to really destroy the Eternal Realm.

At most, they just want to cause a little trouble for the realm god realm, and take revenge by the way.

"The realm of the seam is definitely a place of hope for me and the human race to rise quickly!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Wow!

After a quick departure, he continued to search for resources.

It wasn't long before he found another good thing.

【Extreme Yang Blood Gold】

Before, those powerful forces came in because of this treasure, but I didn't expect it to be so easy to find here.

And after finding this piece of extreme yang blood gold, he encountered the demon seed.
